name: desktop-screenshot-translate-electron
description: Windows MVP Electron shell for ArchSync screenshot translation.

scripts.dev:doctor: npm run doctor && npm run dev
scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check lib/project-config.js && node --check lib/window-state.js && node --check lib/local-pipeline.js && node --check lib/ocr-adapters.js && node --check lib/translation-adapters.js && node --check renderer/overlay/overlay.js && node --check scripts/doctor.js && vite build --config vite.panel.config.mjs
